_meta.source: Prime Self Sacred Texts & Canonical Philosophy
_meta.description: The Six Sciences — disciplines of perception and transformation that form the practitioner's toolkit
_meta.note: Each Science is both a practice to develop and a lens through which to perceive reality. They are not separate from daily life but woven into it.

mindfulness.essence: The mind that watches itself cannot be entirely captured by its own patterns.
mindfulness.description: Heightened present-moment awareness. The foundational science upon which all others rest. Without the ability to observe, all other disciplines become mechanical repetition. Mindfulness allows the practitioner to witness thoughts, emotions, and sensations without identification.
mindfulness.primeApplication: Enables reading your own design and recognizing when you are operating from conditioning vs. authentic nature

fiction: The Miracle of Mindfulness by Thich Nhat Hanh (practical guide)
Be Here Now by Ram Dass
nonFiction: Wherever You Go There You Are by Jon Kabat-Zinn
The Power of Now by Eckhart Tolle

alchemy.essence: The lead you carry is not waste — it is the raw material of your golden future.
alchemy.description: The transformation of base elements into higher forms. This is not mystical nonsense — it is the practical science of transmutation. Pain into wisdom. Trauma into power. Shadow into gift. The alchemist understands that nothing is wasted; everything can be transformed.

stages.nigredo: Blackening — confronting the shadow, the dark night
stages.albedo: Whitening — purification, separating essence from dross
stages.citrinitas: Yellowing — awakening, dawn of new consciousness
stages.rubedo: Reddening — integration, the philosopher's stone achieved

hdMapping.enhancement: Enables transmutation of not-self themes into wisdom

alchemy.primeApplication: Used extensively in working with Frequency Keys shadow-gift-mastery pathway

fiction: The Marriage of Cadmus and Harmony by Roberto Calasso
nonFiction: The Gene Keys by Richard Rudd
Owning Your Own Shadow by Robert Johnson

divination.essence: The universe is constantly communicating — divination is learning to read.
divination.description: The art and science of reading patterns and signs. Not fortune-telling but pattern recognition across seen and unseen domains. The diviner learns to read the language of symbolism, synchronicity, and subtle perception.

hdMapping.enhancement: Recognizing when transits activate gates in your chart

divination.primeApplication: Reading transits, recognizing when particular gates are activated, understanding the meaning of synchronicities in daily life

fiction: The Book of the New Sun by Gene Wolfe
Jonathan Strange & Mr Norrell by Susanna Clarke
The Bone Clocks by David Mitchell
nonFiction: Seventy-Eight Degrees of Wisdom by Rachel Pollack

astrology.essence: The stars do not compel — they incline. The chart is the score; you play the music.
astrology.description: The mapping of celestial influences on earthly existence. Not determinism but a language of archetypal energies and timing. The astrologer understands cosmic patterns and their correspondence with human experience.

integration.withHD: Energy Blueprint uses planetary placements at birth and 88 days before — astrology provides the archetypal context
integration.withGeneKeys: Frequency Keys derive from I Ching hexagrams mapped to zodiacal degrees
integration.withForges: Forge activation is partially determined by natal and transit placements

support: All planetary activations in HD chart
hdMapping.enhancement: Understanding WHY certain gates are activated through planetary archetype

astroMapping.primaryFocus: All planetary bodies and their aspects, transits, and progressions

astrology.primeApplication: Reading today's transits to understand daily energies, timing important decisions with favorable alignments, understanding relationship dynamics through synastry

fiction: A Wrinkle in Time by Madeleine L'Engle
The Once and Future King by T.H. White
The Night Circus by Erin Morgenstern
nonFiction: The Inner Sky by Steven Forrest
Astrology Psychology and the Four Elements by Stephen Arroyo
Saturn: A New Look at an Old Devil by Liz Greene

reiki.essence: You do not generate the energy — you become a channel through which it flows.
reiki.description: Energy channeling and healing. The science of working directly with subtle energy (chi, prana, life force). The practitioner learns to sense, channel, and direct energy for healing and transformation.

levels.level1: Self-healing, sensing energy, basic hand positions
levels.level3: Master level, teaching capability, advanced techniques

hdMapping.enhancement: Understanding your energy type determines how you best work with energy healing

reiki.primeApplication: Self-healing practices, clearing energy before readings, supporting physical and emotional wellbeing

fiction: The Celestine Prophecy by James Redfield
Mutant Message Down Under by Marlo Morgan
Way of the Peaceful Warrior by Dan Millman
nonFiction: Hands of Light by Barbara Brennan

behavioralAlchemy.essence: Habits are not static — they are processes that can be transformed at their roots.
behavioralAlchemy.description: The specialized application of alchemical principles to behavioral patterns. This science focuses on transforming habits, patterns, and automatic behaviors. The behavioral alchemist understands the structure of habits and how to transmute them.

framework.analysis: Understand the underlying need the behavior serves
framework.alternatives: Generate new behaviors that meet the same need
framework.architecture: Design environment to support new pattern
framework.anchoring: Reinforce until new pattern is automatic

hdMapping.enhancement: Identifying which habits arise from conditioning vs. authentic design

behavioralAlchemy.primeApplication: Transforming not-self behaviors into aligned action, building habits that support your Energy Blueprint strategy and authority

fiction: Flowers for Algernon by Daniel Keyes
The Phantom Tollbooth by Norton Juster
Life of Pi by Yann Martel
nonFiction: The Power of Habit by Charles Duhigg
